hero.subtitle: Beautiful dashboard for your OpenRouter activity. Track usage, optimize models and convert costs to
hero.buyMeCoffee: Like it? Buy me a coffee ☕

features.title: Everything you need for
features.subtitle: No spreadsheets. No guessing. Just clean charts and clear numbers.
features.costDesc: Switch currency with one click. The CNB exchange rate updates automatically.
features.chartsDesc: Token usage, model performance, latency, providers — all in one place.
features.csvDesc: Download your activity export from OpenRouter and drag it into the uploader.
features.realLifeDesc: How many espressos, beers or pizzas could your API costs buy?
features.securityDesc: Your data stays in an encrypted cloud, visible only to you.
features.mobileDesc: Web, mobile, tablet and as a native app for iOS and Android.

demo.title: This is what it
demo.subtitle: No login, no registration. Play with charts right now.
demo.cta: Like it? Upload your own data and track

howItWorks.title: 3 steps to
howItWorks.step1Desc: Sign up via email or Google. Takes 10 seconds.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Download activity export from openrouter.ai/activity and upload.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Filter by models, dates and providers. Export to PNG/PDF.

faqSection.title: What people
faqSection.subtitle: Short answers to questions I get all the time.

opensource.desc: The full codebase is public on GitHub. Fork the repo, run locally via Docker and customize the dashboard. Pull requests welcome!

support.title: Support development with
support.desc: Tokeny Monitor is free and open-source. If it saves you time or money, you can say thanks with a symbolic coffee. Every bit of support motivates further improvements. 💜

cta.title: Ready to take
cta.subtitle: Get started in a minute. No credit card.

profile.title: Profile
profile.exportDesc: Download all your data as a CSV file. Contains complete activity rows history.
profile.deleteDesc: Account deletion is irreversible. All your data (activity rows, profile, budget alerts, MCP tokens) will be permanently removed.
profile.confirmDeleteDesc: This action is irreversible. All data will be permanently deleted and cannot be recovered.
